content.p: There is authorized to be appropriated such amounts as may be necessary for purposes of carrying out the provisions of this joint resolution.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This joint resolution, referred to in text, means act Dec. 30, 1947, ch. 526, 61 Stat. 945. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 1919 of the former Appendix to Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
